home.excellenceDesc: We place quality, transparency, and customer satisfaction at the heart of our approach.
home.chiffresDesc: Years of experience and thousands of satisfied customers.
home.solutionsDesc: From routine maintenance to complex repairs, we take care of your vehicle.
home.processusDesc: A methodical 4-step approach to guarantee impeccable service.
home.expertiseDesc: At MÉDECIN AUTO, every intervention is carried out with precision and professionalism. We use modern diagnostic equipment and quality parts to ensure your vehicle's reliability and longevity.
home.engagementDesc: Every service is guided by a firm commitment to excellence, transparency, and customer satisfaction.
home.certificationProDesc: Our team consists of certified technicians meeting the most demanding automotive industry standards.
home.garantieEtendueDesc: All our work is covered by a warranty of up to 6 months, including parts and labor.
home.piecesOEMDesc: We exclusively use spare parts that meet manufacturer specifications for maximum reliability.
home.controleQualiteDesc: Every vehicle undergoes a full technical inspection before and after service to guarantee flawless results.
home.diagnosticApprofondiDesc: Our next-generation diagnostic equipment accurately detects every anomaly, even the subtlest ones.
home.serviceClientDesc: A single point of contact accompanies you throughout your experience, from first contact to post-service follow-up.
home.artMecanique: The Art of Mechanics, Excellence Plus
home.differenceDesc: At MÉDECIN AUTO, we don't just repair vehicles — we preserve your safety and peace of mind. Every intervention is a promise kept.
home.intervention24hDesc: Express service to get you back on the road without delay.
home.devisTransparentDesc: Clear diagnosis and detailed quote before any work begins.
home.vehiculeCourtoisieDesc: Stay mobile during our repairs with a loaner vehicle.
home.certifiePartenaire: Certified — Approved partner of major automotive brands
home.locationDesc: Reliable vehicles for all your trips, by the day or week.
home.philosophieDesc: Since our creation, every intervention reflects our passion for mechanics and our dedication to our customers.
home.integriteDesc: We believe in a relationship of trust with our customers. Honest diagnostics, clear quotes, and no compromise on quality.
home.innovationDesc: Next-generation diagnostic equipment and continuous training for state-of-the-art repairs.
home.proximiteDesc: A team that listens, personalized support, and rigorous follow-up to guarantee your satisfaction at every step.
home.newsletterDesc: Receive our maintenance tips, special offers, and automotive news.
home.serviceCertifieDesc: Mechanical services performed by qualified professionals using certified parts and equipment.
home.diagnosticPrecisDesc: Thorough diagnostics before every intervention for targeted, effective, and lasting repairs.
home.interventionRapideDesc: We respect your deadlines with fast service without ever compromising quality.
home.transparenceTotaleDesc: Detailed quotes, clear explanations, zero hidden fees. You know exactly what you're paying for.
home.equipeExperteDesc: A passionate team trained in the latest technologies and most advanced techniques.
home.garantiePremiumDesc: All our services and vehicles are covered by an extended warranty for your peace of mind.
home.performanceMoteurDesc: Gasoline and diesel engine diagnostics and repair with state-of-the-art equipment.
home.securiteRenforceeDesc: Braking, suspension, steering: every safety point is rigorously checked.
home.maintenancePreventiveDesc: Regular monitoring to anticipate breakdowns and extend your vehicle's lifespan.
home.processEtape1Desc: We analyze your vehicle with our next-generation diagnostic equipment to precisely identify every issue.
home.processEtape2Desc: A detailed quote is provided with a clear explanation of the required work, parts, and timelines.
home.processEtape3Desc: Our expert mechanics perform repairs with precision using OEM quality parts.
home.processEtape4Desc: Every intervention undergoes rigorous quality control before delivery, with personalized follow-up.

about.metaDesc: Discover MÉDECIN AUTO, your premium platform for automotive services and mobility in Senegal. Expertise, transparency, and passion since 2021.
about.heroTitle: Your Vehicle Deserves a Real Mechanic
about.heroDesc: A workshop equipped with cutting-edge technology, a team of expert mechanics, and a quality standard that makes MÉDECIN AUTO the reference for automotive repair in Senegal.
about.atelierDesc: 8 vehicle lifts, next-generation diagnostic tools, and a team of passionate mechanics to take care of your vehicle.
about.expertiseDesc: Technical know-how covering all areas of automotive repair, from traditional mechanics to advanced electronics.
about.parcoursDesc: From a small neighborhood garage to the reference workshop in Senegal. Every step has been marked by investments in equipment and talent.
about.missionDesc: To provide automotive repairs with medical precision — every diagnosis is thorough, every repair is lasting, every customer is informed.
about.mission2: Original or OEM quality spare parts
about.visionDesc: To become the reference automotive repair workshop in West Africa, recognized for its technical expertise, quality equipment, and reliable service.
about.equipeTitle: The Team That Maintains Your Vehicles
about.equipeDesc: Passionate professionals, each specialized in a key area of automotive mechanics.
about.quote: « Your vehicle is your work tool, your freedom, your daily life. At MÉDECIN AUTO, we know this. That's why we put all our expertise at your service to offer you much more than a simple repair: time savings, peace of mind, and the certainty of driving safely. Entrust us with your vehicle, and leave with the assurance of having made the best choice. We are proud to be your trusted partner on the road. »
about.pourquoiTitle: Why Trust Your Vehicle to MÉDECIN AUTO?
about.pourquoiDesc: Concrete reasons that make our workshop the number one choice for discerning drivers.
about.mecaniciensCertifiesDesc: Continuous training in the latest techniques. Expertise validated by professional certifications.
about.interventionExpressDesc: Diagnosis in 30 minutes, repair within 24h for most common interventions.
about.garantie6MoisDesc: All our repairs are guaranteed parts and labor for your peace of mind.
about.equipementsPremiumDesc: Multi-brand diagnostic tools, 3D alignment, AC station — a complete workshop.
about.transparenceRadicaleDesc: Attend the diagnosis, approve the quote, track progress live.
about.servicePretDesc: A courtesy vehicle provided during the duration of repairs.
about.equipeQuote: « Every vehicle that enters our workshop is diagnosed, repaired, and checked as if it were our own. »
about.specialite1Desc: Complete diagnosis and repair of gasoline and diesel engines. Manual and automatic transmissions.
about.specialite2Desc: ABS brake systems, pads, discs, calipers. Suspension, shock absorbers and power steering.
about.specialite2Tools: Pad separator, electronic brake bleeder, 3D alignment
about.specialite3Desc: Replacement of timing belts, chains, tensioners and water pumps. Strict adherence to manufacturer specifications.
about.specialite3Tools: Engine timing kit, certified torque wrench
about.specialite4Desc: AC recharge, fault diagnosis, compressor replacement. Complete engine cooling systems.
about.specialite4Tools: AC service station, thermal camera, leak detector
about.specialite5Desc: Direct and indirect injection systems. Engine ECUs, sensors, probes and wiring harnesses.
about.specialite5Tools: Oscilloscope, multimeter, diesel injection test bench
about.specialite6Desc: Exhaust lines, catalytic converters, DPF, EGR valve. Emission system compliance.
about.specialite6Tools: Gas analyzer, inspection camera, DPF removal tool
about.timeline1Desc: MÉDECIN AUTO opens its first mechanical repair workshop in Dakar. Two vehicle lifts and a team of passionate mechanics offering excellence.
about.timeline2Desc: The workshop acquires multi-brand diagnostic tools and a 3D alignment system. First ISO technical certification.
about.timeline3Desc: Investment in a new 500m² facility with 6 vehicle lifts, an AC service station, and a dedicated engine workshop. Launch of vehicle rental service.
about.timeline4Desc: Full digitalization: online diagnostics, real-time service tracking, and booking platform. The most connected workshop in Senegal.
about.team1Bio: Founder and visionary of MÉDECIN AUTO. With expertise in management and a passion for automobiles, he drives the strategy and excellence standards of the workshop.
about.team2Bio: Experienced mechanic with in-depth knowledge of mechanical systems. He handles all types of repairs with rigor and professionalism.
about.team3Bio: Trained in American techniques, he brings unique expertise acquired in the United States. Specialist in advanced technologies and international repair standards.
about.team4Bio: Versatile technician with solid know-how, excelling in diagnosis and repair of mechanical and electrical systems. Rigorous and methodical.
about.team5Bio: First point of contact for our clients, she combines technical competence with service excellence. She ensures personalized welcome, service follow-up, and coordination with the mechanical team.
about.team6Bio: Mechatronics expert mastering the interface between mechanics and electronics. Specialist in embedded systems, sensors, and modern ECUs.
about.team7Bio: Expert in administrative and financial management, she handles budgeting, accounting, and process optimization. She ensures operational rigor and compliance within the workshop.
about.team8Bio: Specialist in automotive electrical systems, handling diagnosis and repair of circuits from lighting to ECUs. Rigorous and methodical, ensuring quality interventions.

services.metaDesc: Diagnostics, maintenance, engine repair, tires, AC, and automotive advice in Senegal.
services.title: Excellence in Mechanical Services
services.heroDesc: From routine maintenance to complex repairs, our team of certified mechanics takes care of your vehicle with passion and professionalism.
services.expertiseDesc: From electronic diagnostics to mechanical repairs, we cover all your vehicle's needs.
services.processTitle: Your Vehicle Taken Care of from A to Z
services.step1Desc: Contact us or come to the workshop. We listen to your needs and inspect your vehicle free of charge.
services.step2Desc: Receive a detailed, personalized quote. No surprises — you approve before any work begins.
services.step3Desc: Our certified mechanics work with the most modern equipment for fast, reliable repairs.
services.step4Desc: Every repair is tested and validated. You leave with a warranty and peace of mind.
services.whyDesc: We aren't just a simple garage — we are automotive enthusiasts committed to your satisfaction and safety.
services.whyEquipementsDesc: Multi-brand diagnostic tools, 3D alignment, AC station — a complete workshop for all vehicle types.
services.whyGarantieDesc: All our services are guaranteed parts and labor. Your satisfaction is our top priority.
services.whyPretDesc: A loaner vehicle provided so you can go about your business during repairs.
services.serviceDiagnosticGeneralDesc: A complete and precise diagnosis of your vehicle using our state-of-the-art electronic equipment.
services.serviceVidangeDesc: Complete engine oil change with premium quality oils suited to each type of engine.
services.serviceEntretienGeneralDesc: A full service to preserve the performance and longevity of your vehicle.
services.servicePneumatiqueDesc: Mounting, balancing and 3D geometry for optimal tire performance.
services.serviceClimatisationDesc: Diagnosis, recharge and complete maintenance of your automotive air conditioning system.
services.serviceAssuranceEtSuiviDesc: Full handling of insurance claims and personalized follow-up on your cases.
services.serviceReparationMoteurDesc: Diagnosis and repair of all types of diesel and gasoline engines, from classic to latest models.
services.serviceVenteLocationVehiculesDesc: A selection of inspected used vehicles and flexible rental solutions.
services.serviceConseilsAccompagnementDesc: Personalized support for all your automotive projects: purchase, sale, maintenance and technical advice.

vehicles.heroDesc: Vehicles carefully inspected, certified, and guaranteed. Every car in our fleet is selected for its impeccable quality.
vehicles.descriptionDisponible: Every vehicle is rigorously inspected and certified to offer you optimal quality.

blog.emptyDesc: Our articles are being written. Come back soon to discover our automotive tips and guides.

contact.metaDesc: Contact us for a booking, a quote, or any inquiry.
contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Vehicle
contact.heroDesc: A question, a project, an emergency? Our team is here for you. Whether for a repair, a purchase, or a rental, we are here to help.
contact.formDesc: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.faqDesc: Find answers to the most common questions before contacting us.
contact.faq1R: Yes, we offer free diagnostics and quotes for any type of repair or maintenance.
contact.faq2R: We answer all requests within 24 business hours.
contact.faq3Q: Can I book a service online?
contact.faq3R: Absolutely. Use the form on this page or contact us directly by phone.
contact.explorezDesc: Discover our services, our vehicle selection, and much more.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about MÉDECIN AUTO.

rentals.metaDesc: Rent a reliable and comfortable vehicle for all your trips. Short and long-term rental at the best rates.
rentals.title: Drive with Peace of Mind
rentals.heroDesc: Clean, reliable, well-maintained vehicles for all your trips. Short-term, long-term, or with driver.
rentals.processDesc: A simple and fast process to get behind the wheel today.
rentals.step1Desc: Browse our range of vehicles and select the one that meets your needs.
rentals.step2Desc: Contact us to book your vehicle. Simple, fast, and no obligation.
rentals.step3Desc: Pick up your clean, ready-to-go vehicle. Enjoy the road with complete peace of mind.
rentals.descriptionDisponible: Every vehicle is rigorously prepared and disinfected before each rental.
rentals.descriptionIndisponible: Our fleet is being updated. Come back soon or contact us for more information.
rentals.emptyTitle: No vehicles available at the moment
rentals.emptyDesc: Our rental fleet is being renewed. Leave your contact to be notified of new offers.
rentals.whyDesc: We pride ourselves on offering an impeccable rental service.
rentals.whyAssuranceDesc: All our vehicles are insured for your complete peace of mind.
rentals.whyRecentsDesc: Our fleet is regularly renewed to offer you modern, reliable vehicles.
rentals.whyPropresDesc: Every vehicle is meticulously cleaned and disinfected before each rental.
rentals.whyAssistanceDesc: Our team is available anytime to assist you if needed.
rentals.ctaDesc: Contact us to book this vehicle or get more information.
